Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: documents by function [300137955], document genres [300026031], information forms (objects) [300220751], Information Forms (hierarchy name) [300026029], Visual and Verbal Communication (hierarchy name) [300264552], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: books by conditions of production [300211165], books [300028051], information artifacts by physical form [300137960], information artifacts [300230425], information forms (objects) [300220751], Information Forms (hierarchy name) [300026029], Visual and Verbal Communication (hierarchy name) [300264552], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Books or pads of blank sheets used or intended for sketching, which are informal or rough drawings.
Libros o blocs de hojas en blanco usadas o para ser usadas en bosquejos.
Boeken of blokken blanco papier die worden gebruikt of zijn bedoeld om op te schetsen.
書簿或空白頁便條紙簿，用於或準備素描，其為非正式的或粗略的繪畫。
Livros ou blocos de folhas em branco usadas ou destinadas a esboçar, que são desenhos informais ou grosseiros.

Source.Source_ID: 2000001761/Hickerson and Engst, Terms for use in Field 655 (1984)
